channel.title: GitHub ActionScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ActionScript in GitHub

item.title: InQuest/malware-samples
item.description: A collection of malware samples and relevant dissection information, most probably referenced from http://blog.inquest.net

item.title: ChickenProp/love
item.description: 48 hour game "Love in the Time of Spaceships"

item.title: jhuckaby/webcamjs
item.description: HTML5 Webcam Image Capture Library with Flash Fallback
